reference: My two-year-old just had a mustard brown colored stool. It literally looked like a million tiny little sesame seeds and easily broke apart with a flaky texture. The sesame seed appearance had sharp edges. What am I looking at? I have to wait to take him to the doctor in the morning.
text: My 2-year-old just had a mustard-brown colored stool; it literally looked like a million. Little sesame seeds and easily broke apart with a flaky texture; the sesame seed appearance had sharp edges. What am I looking at? I have to wait to take him to the doctor in the morning.
